title: Lan World Discord Integration
description: A lightweight mod that allows lan or singleplayer worlds to be connected to your discord server. Works on multiplayer servers too!
body: # Lan World Discord Integration It is a mod that allows the user to link their singleplayer/lan world or a multiplayer server to a channel in a discord server, **only the host should have this mod installed**. ## Installation Guide ### Installing the mod First, drag the mod file into your mod folder. Fabric api is **required** for all versions. Use fabric version **v0.16.14** or above. If you are using forge, install Sinytra Connector and Forgified fabric api. Now run the game, a file with the name `lan-world-discord-integration.toml` should be generated in your config folder: After this step, you can close Minecraft and start setting up the discord bot. ### Discord Bot setup 1. In [discord developer portal](https://discord.com/developers/applications), click new applications. Then check the following permissions: Now copy the link below and paste it in a new tab. If you can't add the bot to your discord server, it could be because you don't have the `Manage Server` permission in your discord server. After your bot is in your server, time to set it up in Minecraft. ### Configuring the config file Go to the bot page in developer portal and click `Reset Token`: Then copy it. Open `lan-world-discord-integration.toml`, paste the token in like this, make sure you save the file too. Now go to your discord settings, in `Advanced` section, enable developer mode. Go to your server and right click the channel you want the bot to be at, then click `Copy Channel Id` Now paste the channel id in like this in `lan-world-discord-integration.toml`, make sure to save the file. Now you can start Minecraft, once you enter a world, the bot should start automatically. I will add a command in game to allow the user to start and stop the bot in the future I promise. This is what it should look like once it started running normally: Now enjoy your simple Minecraft-Discord messenger! -BackslashTrash, 2025-07-25
